goods_description.certificate_value:
General packing of cans/bottles, 2 pallets
See att invoice (DownPayment 450) dated 2026-03-04
Beer with and without alcohol in different flavors
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple detailed product lines referencing 'Beer' products with corresponding item codes and origin Sweden
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains general goods description with explicit invoice reference and invoice date matching invoice number SEG-26D-467543 dated 2026-03-04. Invoice details multiple beer product lines under the same invoice number, confirming goods description coverage. Rule 4.3.5 applied resulting in MATCH.

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity is 4752 pcs exactly matching the invoice quantity field under 'No. of units: 4752'. Units and numeric value match exactly, no contradictions. Rule 4.4.3.1 applied resulting in MATCH.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin is Sweden, which is explicitly specified in the invoice for all goods. EU-normalization rules applied and Sweden is EU member at certificate date. No contradictory origins found. Rule 4.5.4.1 applied resulting in MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All verified control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin) have matching values supported by applicable rules and normalization. No contradictions or uncertainties detected. Documents are consistent for automatic approval.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan därför godkännas automatiskt utan vidare manuell granskning.
